mustSupport: MarkItDown is more relevant to document imports than live clipboard processing.

The MCP or package link is supporting evidence for the import-adapter discussion.
Import adapters should run inside Rust background jobs with scheduler ownership.

Python-based adapters are acceptable only behind the runtime boundary.
The benchmark idea is useful but still a follow-up task rather than durable knowledge on its own.
